name: Travis CI
tagline: Inspect and control Travis CI repositories and builds
description: Look up a Travis CI repository, list and inspect its builds, and restart or cancel a build. Requires a Travis CI API token generated via the Travis CLI or account profile page.

auth.hint: Generate a token with the Travis CLI (travis login && travis token) or from your Travis CI profile page, then send it as Authorization: token YOUR_TOKEN. Store the complete value, including the "token " prefix, in Arthur MCP Secrets. Tokens for travis-ci.com and the legacy travis-ci.org host are not interchangeable.

tools.name: get_repository
tools.description: Retrieve a Travis CI repository's details by its owner/name slug.

params.name: Travis-API-Version
params.description: Must be set to 3 on every request.

tools.name: list_builds
tools.description: List builds for a repository, with optional filtering and sorting.

params.name: repository_id
params.description: Numeric ID uniquely identifying the repository.

params.name: limit
params.description: How many builds to include in the response.

params.name: offset
params.description: How many builds to skip before the first entry in the response.

params.name: sort_by
params.description: Field(s) to sort by, e.g. id, started_at, number; append :desc to reverse. Default is number:desc,id:desc.

params.name: Travis-API-Version
params.description: Must be set to 3 on every request.

tools.name: get_build
tools.description: Retrieve a single build by its ID.

params.name: build_id
params.description: Numeric ID uniquely identifying the build.

params.name: Travis-API-Version
params.description: Must be set to 3 on every request.

tools.name: restart_build
tools.description: Restart a completed or canceled build.

params.name: build_id
params.description: Numeric ID uniquely identifying the build to restart.

params.name: Travis-API-Version
params.description: Must be set to 3 on every request.

tools.name: cancel_build
tools.description: Cancel an active build and its associated jobs.

params.name: build_id
params.description: Numeric ID uniquely identifying the build to cancel.

params.name: Travis-API-Version
params.description: Must be set to 3 on every request.
